responses:
theorem P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P1 (A := A) := by
  intro hP2
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P1 at *
  exact Set.Subset.trans hP2 (interior_subset _)

theorem closure_subset_of_subset_closed
    {α : Type*} [TopologicalSpace α] {s t : Set α}
    (h₁ : s ⊆ t) (h₂ : IsClosed t) : closure s ⊆ t := by
  exact closure_minimal h₁ h₂
